hooks.command: [ -f "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/hot.md" ] && { echo '=== hot.md (recent wiki context, read silently, do not announce) ==='; cat "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/hot.md"; } || true
[ -f "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/hot.md" ] && { echo '=== hot.md (restoring hot cache post-compaction, read silently) ==='; cat "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/hot.md"; } || true

[ -d .git ] && [ -f hot.md ] && git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '^(daily/|weekly/|decisions/|knowledge/|people/|plans/|INDEX\.md|log\.md|lessons\.md)|/initiatives/' && echo 'HOT_CACHE_REMINDER: The wiki was modified in this session but hot.md may be out of sync. If appropriate, update hot.md (overwrite completely, ~500 words, format: Last Updated / Key Recent Facts / Recent Changes / Active Threads / Open Patterns) before the user ends the session. If /end-session or /daily-log was already run, this update already happened — do not repeat it.' || true
